description.desc_thousand_char: Yasham Speciality Ingredients Private Limited (YSIPL), as per its credit rating report, is engaged in the trading of specialty chemicals products that are mainly used in the pharmaceuticals, personal care, chemicals, veterinary, exports, food, and nutraceutical industries. It also generates revenues from indenting commissions for these products. It has a 2,000 sq mt FDA-approved warehouse in Bhiwandi (near Mumbai) with a logistics team to take care of inbound and outbound logistics. YSIPL has a branch office located in New Delhi and its infrastructure includes two application labs, one for the personal care division. The company was incorporated in 1997 and has its registered office located in Mumbai, Maharashtra.
